shortDescription: অতীতে কোনো নির্দিষ্ট সময়ে চলমান ছিল এমন কাজ প্রকাশ করে।

rules.title: was এবং were এর ব্যবহার
rules.explanation: Subject অনুযায়ী was বা were বেছে নাও:
points: I / He / She / It → was ব্যবহার করো
We / You / They → were ব্যবহার করো
Singular nouns → was | Plural nouns → were

examples.english: They were playing in the park.

rules.title: দুটো কাজ একসাথে (When/While)
rules.explanation: অতীতে দুটো কাজ একই সময়ে বা একটার মধ্যে অন্যটা হলে:
points: while + Past Continuous (চলমান) + when + Past Indefinite (হঠাৎ ঘটল)
While I was sleeping, the phone rang. (ঘুমাচ্ছিলাম + হঠাৎ ফোন বাজল)
When he arrived, I was cooking. (সে এলো + রান্না চলছিল)
দুটো চলমান কাজ: While she was reading, he was writing.

examples.english: While I was studying, the light went out.
examples.bangla: আমি পড়াশোনা করছিলাম, তখন বিদ্যুৎ চলে গেল।

examples.english: When it started raining, we were playing.

rules.title: Signal Words
rules.explanation: এই শব্দগুলো দেখলে Past Continuous সন্দেহ করো:
points: at that time, at this time yesterday
all day long, the whole morning, throughout
নির্দিষ্ট অতীত সময়: at 8 AM yesterday, at that moment

examples.english: She was watching TV all evening.
What were you doing at 5 PM?

keyPoints: While + Past Continuous + when + Past Simple
Verb-ing তৈরির নিয়ম Present Continuous এর মতো
while, at that time → Past Continuous এর চিহ্ন
